_comment: Airports with no commercial passenger flights (closed, non-commercial, cargo-only, etc.). Used to filter multi-airport city queries to avoid timeouts on non-functional airports. Users can manually edit this file to add/remove entries.

NAY.name: Beijing Nanyuan Airport
NAY.reason: Closed 2019-09-25. All flights transferred to PKX (Daxing).

SIA.name: Xi'an Xiguan Airport
SIA.reason: Closed 1991. All flights transferred to XIY (Xianyang).

THF.name: Berlin Tempelhof Airport
THF.reason: Closed 2008-10-30. Site converted to public park.

TXL.name: Berlin-Tegel International Airport
TXL.reason: Closed 2020-11-08. All flights transferred to BER (Brandenburg).

ISL.name: Istanbul Ataturk Airport
ISL.reason: Passenger ops closed 2019-04-06. Replaced by IST (Istanbul Airport).

BKA.name: Moscow Bykovo Airport
BKA.reason: Passenger operations ended 2010. General aviation only.

DIA.name: Doha International Airport
DIA.reason: Passenger flights moved to DOH (Hamad International) 2014-05-27.

NYS.name: New York Skyports Seaplane Base
NYS.reason: Seaplane base only. Not a conventional airport for flight search.

BQH.name: London Biggin Hill Airport
BQH.reason: Business aviation only. No scheduled commercial passenger service.

LBG.name: Paris-Le Bourget Airport
LBG.reason: Business/private aviation only since 1980. No commercial passenger flights.

YZD.name: Toronto Downsview Airport
YZD.reason: Closed April 2024. Former de Havilland facility, being redeveloped.

YXD.name: Edmonton City Centre Airport
YXD.reason: Closed 2013-11-30. Land redeveloped as Blatchford community.

HEM.name: Helsinki-Malmi Airport
HEM.reason: Closed to aviation 2021-03-14. Land planned for development.

BPM.name: Hyderabad Begumpet Airport
BPM.reason: Commercial flights ended 2008. Replaced by HYD (Rajiv Gandhi Intl).

VBC.name: Mandalay Chanmyathazi Airport
VBC.reason: Replaced by MDL (Mandalay International) in 2000. Abandoned.

MHP.name: Minsk-1 Airport
MHP.reason: Commercial flights ended 2012. Airport closed 2015. Demolished 2019.

DAX.name: Dazhou Heshi Airport
DAX.reason: Commercial flights ended 2022-05-18. Replaced by DZH (Jinya Airport).

YHJ.name: Nanchang Yaohu Airport
YHJ.reason: Test flight / general aviation only. No commercial passenger service.

DET.name: Coleman A. Young Municipal Airport
DET.reason: General aviation only since ~2000. No scheduled commercial service.

ECV.name: Madrid Cuatro Vientos Airport
ECV.reason: Flight training and helicopters only. No commercial passenger flights.

BXN.name: Bodrum-Imsik Airport
BXN.reason: No commercial flights since late 1990s. Replaced by BJV (Milas-Bodrum).

XFW.name: Hamburg-Finkenwerder Airport
XFW.reason: Private Airbus factory airfield. No public scheduled services.

MTS.name: Matsapha Airport
MTS.reason: Commercial flights ended 2014-09-29. Replaced by SHO (King Mswati III).

QRA.name: Johannesburg Rand Airport
QRA.reason: General aviation only since 1940. No commercial passenger flights.

GSE.name: Gothenburg City Airport (Save)
GSE.reason: Closed to airline traffic 2015-01-18. Runway damage.

LAD.name: Luanda Quatro de Fevereiro Airport
LAD.reason: Commercial ops transferred to NBJ (Dr. Antonio Agostinho Neto) by Oct 2025.

CSO.name: Magdeburg-Cochstedt Airport
CSO.reason: No scheduled commercial flights since 2013. Now drone test center.

NHA.name: Nha Trang Airport
NHA.reason: No commercial passenger flights. CXR (Cam Ranh) serves Nha Trang.

TIP.name: Tripoli International Airport
TIP.reason: Closed. No commercial passenger flights. MJI serves Tripoli.

ALY.name: Alexandria El Nouzha Airport
ALY.reason: Closed 2011. All flights transferred to HBE (Borg El Arab).
